## Verification Report: 0162-resolve-all-cli-artifact-operations

| # | Criterion | Result | Evidence |
|---|-----------|--------|----------|
| 1 | All CLI commands that read/write artifacts are audited | ✅ PASS | Comprehensive audit table covers all 14 call sites (list, show, create, status, agents, artifacts, run, settings). Verified modules exist via grep — 12 source/test files confirm the referenced functions. |
| 2 | At least 2 sharing approaches evaluated with pros/cons | ✅ PASS | Three approaches evaluated: git-level sharing (§2), symlinks (§3), and runtime resolution (§4), each with detailed pros/cons and verdicts. |
| 3 | Recommended approach documented with implementation sketch | ✅ PASS | Runtime resolution recommended (§4 + §6) with Python code sketch. Notably, the fix has **already been implemented** in `core.py` — `_walk_up()` helper exists (line 108) and `find_root()` (line 125) already prefers main repo root when in a worktree. |
| 4 | Write conflict risks are assessed | ✅ PASS | Section 5 assesses create (atomic via `O_CREAT|O_EXCL`), status transitions (non-atomic but low risk), frontmatter appends, and log files. Concludes no new race conditions introduced. |

**All 4 criteria passed.** Task transitioned to `verified`.

You can run `/openstation.done 0162-resolve-all-cli-artifact-operations` when ready to complete it.
